title: Kaerix's Stylish Optimizations
description: Vanilla modpack for optimization and looks!
body:
Hi! I've always had a desire to design my own modpack that optimized my game from vanilla, without adding too much unnecessary bloat, and that enhances your Minecraft experience and makes it look fabulous!

Here I am sharing it to those who are interested! If you have any requests or issues message me on Discord: @kaerix0

Pack includes (among others):
Distant Horizons, Sodium, Iris Shaders, Lots of different QoL and optimization mods, Pretty resource packs, Compatibility with the latest version! (if possible)

and many more...

This project includes a custom [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) resource pack! Click to make your own if you'd like!

Enjoy!
